_doc: Declarative feed specs for server/services/feed_scraper.py. Copy this to server/data/feeds.json (or point $FEEDS_CONFIG at it) and edit. Entries here OVERRIDE the built-in DEFAULT_FEEDS by 'name'. Each feed writes a time-series into the History Lake (history_lake.db) as series (source, entity, metric, unit, freq) with idempotent observations. Run: python -m server.services.feed_scraper list | once [name...] | forever | selftest

feeds.name: _example_epoch_api
feeds._doc: Template for a generic JSON API whose records carry an epoch-seconds timestamp. Disabled by default — set a real url and flip enabled to true.

feeds.name: _example_multi_entity
feeds._doc: Template for an API returning many entities in one response. entity_field splits records into one series per entity (e.g. per-station, per-symbol). Disabled by default.
